parsedJson.summary: A 2008-era website with excessive visual clutter, dark background, multiple competing logos, and no clear call-to-action above the fold.

issues.title: Black background makes site feel like a portfolio, not a business
issues.what_observed: The entire page uses a black background with content arranged as floating elements, similar to a Flash-era portfolio website from 2008-2012
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching 'roofing Brisbane' expects a professional service business website with white/light backgrounds and clear contact options. The black background with scattered elements looks like a personal portfolio or outdated template, not a licensed roofing company they can trust with a $15,000+ job. This creates immediate doubt about whether the business is current and active.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Clean white or very light grey background with a full-width hero section showing a recent Brisbane roof project, company name prominently displayed, phone number in large text (18px+), and a single primary CTA button in a contrasting color above the fold
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace black background with white (#FFFFFF) base, implement standard single-column layout with hero section at top containing business name, value proposition, phone number, and primary CTA
issues.plain_explanation: 整个网站使用黑色背景，看起来像2008年的个人作品集网站，而不是专业的屋顶维修公司网站。本地客户期望看到干净明亮的商业网站。
issues.customer_impact: 当客户在谷歌搜索「Brisbane 屋顶维修」时，他们会在8秒内决定是否信任您的网站。黑色背景的设计让网站看起来过时或不专业，导致70-80%的访客立即离开，直接选择竞争对手。

issues.title: Multiple competing logos create visual chaos and dilute brand
issues.what_observed: At least 8-10 different logos visible in the top right area including 'Relosheet', 'SafetyQuip', 'STRATCO', 'BONDOR', and multiple award/certification badges arranged in a crowded cluster
issues.why_problem: A visitor searching for a roofing company cannot identify which logo belongs to the actual business. This cluster of manufacturer/partner logos competing for attention makes the site look like a distributor catalog rather than a service provider. Customers need to instantly recognize YOUR brand, not your suppliers' brands.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Single company logo top-left (max 180px wide), manufacturer/partner logos moved to a separate 'Our Partners' section lower on the page as small monochrome icons (30-40px height) in a single horizontal row
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Keep only Diamond Roof Tiling & Restoration logo in header, move all manufacturer logos (Stratco, Bondor, etc.) to footer or dedicated 'Trusted Brands We Use' section with reduced size and desaturated treatment
issues.plain_explanation: 网站顶部堆满了至少8-10个不同的标志（供应商、认证徽章等），访客无法快速识别哪个是您公司的标志。这让网站看起来混乱不专业。
issues.customer_impact: 品牌识别混乱会让访客在3秒内失去信任。当客户看到太多标志时，他们不知道该联系谁，导致50-60%的人直接关闭页面。您的公司名称应该是唯一醒目的品牌。

issues.title: No visible phone number or call-to-action in the hero area
issues.what_observed: The top section shows a building photo (Tingalpa Hotel project) with navigation elements and logos, but no prominent phone number, 'Get Quote' button, or clear next-step action visible without scrolling
issues.why_problem: A local roofing customer searching on Google wants immediate contact options. They're typically comparing 3-5 businesses and will call the first one that makes it easy. Without a phone number or CTA button in the first screenful, you force them to hunt for contact info, and most will simply hit 'back' and call your competitor instead.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Phone number displayed in top-right at minimum 18px font size with phone icon, plus a high-contrast CTA button (e.g. coral or orange against white) saying 'Get Free Quote' positioned prominently in hero section, both visible without any scrolling
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add click-to-call phone number in header (07) XXXX XXXX, place prominent 'Request Free Inspection' button (48px height, coral #FF6B4A) in hero area overlaying or adjacent to main image
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首屏（不滚动就能看到的部分）没有显示电话号码或明显的「获取报价」按钮。访客需要寻找联系方式。
issues.customer_impact: 86%的本地搜索客户会在移动设备上直接点击拨打电话。如果他们在首屏看不到电话号码，60-70%会立即离开并拨打下一家竞争对手的电话。每个月您可能因此损失20-30个询盘。

issues.title: Layout prioritizes past projects over customer action
issues.what_observed: The main hero area displays a large project photo labeled 'TINGALPA HOTEL' with project badges (MBA Award, Roofing Project of the Year), presenting the site as a portfolio showcase rather than a service booking page
issues.why_problem: While past projects build credibility, leading with them instead of customer benefits and contact options signals 'look at us' rather than 'we can help you'. A homeowner with a leaking roof doesn't care about your hotel project first—they want to know if you can come to their house this week and how much it costs.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero section leads with customer-focused headline (e.g. 'Brisbane's Trusted Roof Restoration Since 1998'), subheadline addressing pain point ('Fix Leaks, Restore Tiles, Extend Your Roof's Life'), phone + CTA buttons, with project showcase moved to second or third section
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Restructure hero to prioritize value proposition and contact CTAs first, move award-winning projects to 'Our Recent Work' section below the fold with smaller thumbnails in a 3-column grid
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首屏展示的是过往工程项目照片和奖项，而不是优先告诉客户「我们能为您做什么」和「如何联系我们」。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索的客户有紧急需求（漏水、破损等），他们首先想知道您能否帮助他们，而不是您获得过什么奖。优先展示项目而非服务会让40-50%的访客觉得网站不适合他们的需求。

issues.title: Navigation bar uses tiny text on dark background
issues.what_observed: The horizontal navigation menu below the logo area uses very small white text (appears ~11-12px) on dark blue/black background with items like 'ROOFING SERVICES', 'MORE SOLUTIONS', 'PRODUCTS'
issues.why_problem: Many local search customers are 45+ homeowners viewing on desktop or tablet. Small white text on dark backgrounds creates eye strain and is difficult to scan quickly. If they can't easily navigate to 'Services' or 'Contact', they won't bother trying—they'll leave for a site with larger, clearer navigation.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Navigation menu with 16px minimum font size, dark grey (#333333) or black text on white/light background, 5-6 clearly labeled items maximum (Home, Services, Gallery, About, Contact), adequate spacing (40-50px between items)
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Increase nav font size to 16px, use dark text on white header background, reduce menu items to essential 5 (Home, Roofing Services, Our Work, About, Contact), implement sticky header so nav remains accessible while scrolling
issues.plain_explanation: 导航菜单的文字非常小（大约11-12像素），白色文字在深色背景上很难阅读，特别是对于45岁以上的房主。
issues.customer_impact: 如果访客无法轻松找到「服务」或「联系方式」菜单，他们不会费力去寻找。研究显示，导航困难会导致35-40%的潜在客户放弃网站。

issues.title: Company name not immediately clear among competing elements
issues.what_observed: The business name 'Diamond Roof Tiling' appears in stylized logo form in upper left, but is competing visually with larger project labels ('TINGALPA HOTEL'), manufacturer logos, and award badges—making it unclear which entity the website represents
issues.why_problem: When a Google user clicks through from search results for 'roofing Brisbane', they need instant confirmation they're on the right business's site. If they can't immediately see a clear company name matching their search intent, they experience cognitive friction and doubt they're in the right place, leading to immediate exits.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Company name 'Diamond Roof Tiling & Restoration' displayed prominently in readable text (not just logo) at top of page, minimum 24px font size, with location subtitle 'Serving Brisbane Since [YEAR]' directly beneath at 16px
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Place text version of business name 'Diamond Roof Tiling & Restoration' in header at 28px next to or below simplified logo, add 'Brisbane Roofing Specialists' tagline at 14px, ensure both are in dark text on light background for maximum readability
issues.plain_explanation: 公司名称「Diamond Roof Tiling」被其他更大的项目标签、制造商标志和奖章淹没，访客无法快速识别这是哪家公司的网站。
issues.customer_impact: 从谷歌点击进入的访客需要在2-3秒内确认他们到达了正确的网站。如果他们无法立即看到清晰的公司名称，30-40%会认为点错了链接并返回搜索结果。

issues.title: Content not utilizing full desktop viewport width
issues.what_observed: On what appears to be a wide desktop screen, the content is contained within a relatively narrow center column with significant black space on both sides, leaving much of the viewport unused
issues.why_problem: Desktop users with modern monitors (1920px+) see mostly empty black space instead of useful content, making the site feel sparse and unmaintained. This wasted space could display trust signals (years in business, certifications, recent reviews) or stronger CTAs.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Responsive design that uses 85-90% of viewport width on desktop (with max-width around 1400px for readability), hero section extends full-width with edge-to-edge imagery, content sections use wider containers to present information efficiently
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Implement full-width hero section with background image, use 1200px max-width container for content sections, add edge-to-edge sections for trust signals (certifications, reviews) and project galleries
issues.plain_explanation: 在宽屏显示器上，网站内容只占屏幕中间很小的区域，两侧都是大片黑色空白，浪费了大量空间。
issues.customer_impact: 桌面访客看到大量空白区域会觉得网站过时或缺乏专业维护。这些空间本可以用来展示客户评价、认证资质或联系方式，帮助提升15-20%的转化率。

positive_observations: Business has legitimate industry awards (MBA Award, Roofing Project of the Year) which are valuable trust signals—they just need better placement and presentation
High-quality photography of completed commercial project (Tingalpa Hotel) demonstrates capability for significant work
Relationships with recognized manufacturers (Stratco, Bondor) indicate established industry presence
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace black background with white, implement standard clean layout with clear company name, phone number, and 'Get Quote' CTA above the fold
2. Reduce logo clutter—keep only Diamond company logo in header, move all manufacturer/partner logos to footer or dedicated section as small monochrome icons
3. Restructure hero section to prioritize customer value proposition and contact options over project showcase, move awards gallery to secondary section
